summary: Applied two surgical seam edits: tightened the opening sound-cue handoff from chapter_01 boundary context and sharpened the exit countdown to align with chapter_03's Christmas-morning entry.
edits: Rewrote chapter opening sentence to begin on the hall letter-slot sequence (including next-door echo) before Noreen wakes, preserving all original narrative facts and tone.
Adjusted final sentence from 'till Christmas' to 'till Christmas morning' to improve exit-to-next-entry temporal continuity.
